ItacPersonItem.Notes: Pontevico was a poet and also a bibliophile. For his poetry, see Mario Crescimbeni L`istoria della volgar poesia (1730). For his interest in book collecting, see Angela Nuovo, `Ritratto di collezionista da giovane. Peiresc a casa Pinelli`, in Peiresc e l`Italia (2009), p. 6. Pinelli had Pontevico`s booklist, which Peiresc saw. The French scholar asked Galileo for information about Pontevico in a letter dated 1637.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
